electron.description: Owns Electron main/preload processes, IPC handlers, native dialogs, file system access, and desktop shell configuration.

frontend.description: Owns all React components, UI layout, CSS styling, state management, and user interaction patterns.

infra.description: Owns build configuration, dependency management, TypeScript setup, Vite/Electron packaging, config loading, and project infrastructure.

llm.description: Owns LLM client abstraction, streaming responses, OCR system prompts, and provider integration.
